name: Management Reporting Playbook Lens
summary: Management Reporting Playbook Lens gives accounting work a clearer decision structure.
whenToUseIt: Use this when the team needs a stronger way to reason about management reporting playbook lens without adding unnecessary complexity.
steps: Map the signal and constraints that matter most.
Choose the smallest next move that improves the system.
